lancha.title: Boat Tours in Maragogi - Meu Caribe
lancha.banner.description: Discover the best of Maragogi aboard our comfortable and safe boats. Sail to the natural pools and enjoy an unforgettable day of sun and sea.
lancha.options.subtitle: Exclusive routes departing from Peroba Beach
lancha.piscina.title: POOL EXPERIENCE
lancha.piscina.price_shared_label: Shared from 2 to 8 people per person
lancha.piscina.obs: For shared tours we do not stop at CAMINHO DA BELEZA, and coolers and speakers are not allowed.
lancha.orla.title: COASTLINE EXPERIENCE
lancha.orla.roteiro_header: Peroba, Dourado, Xaréu, Antunes, Ponta de Mangue
lancha.deluxe.title: MEU CARIBE DELUXE
lancha.deluxe.bbq_description: 1:30h duration at Bruna Sandbank with JBL Boombox speaker. For 2 to 8 people.
lancha.gallery.subtitle: Get inspired by photos from our tours and the beauty of Maragogi.
lancha.videos.subtitle: Watch and feel the energy of our tours.
lancha.faq.a1: Snorkeling is not included in the tour, but can be booked as an extra. Please contact our team for details on prices and availability.
lancha.faq.a2: Boat tours usually last between 3 to 5 hours, depending on the chosen route. Check our packages for more details.
lancha.faq.q3: Do I need to book in advance?
lancha.faq.a3: Yes, we recommend booking in advance to secure your spot, especially during peak season.
lancha.faq.q4: How much does the tour cost?
lancha.faq.a4: Costs vary depending on the chosen package. Check our packages for more details.
lancha.faq.q5: What safety measures are in place?
lancha.faq.a5: Our boats are equipped with life jackets and we follow all maritime safety regulations. The crew is trained to ensure a safe experience for all passengers.
lancha.faq.q6: What should I bring on the tour?
lancha.faq.a6: We recommend bringing sunscreen, a hat, sunglasses, swimwear, a towel, and a camera to capture the special moments.
lancha.faq.q7: Are there food options during the tour?
lancha.faq.a7: Some packages include snacks and drinks. Check the details of your chosen package or contact us for more information.
lancha.faq.q8: Is the tour suitable for children?
lancha.faq.a8: Yes, our tours are suitable for all ages. However, we recommend that children under 5 are accompanied by an adult and wear life jackets at all times.
lancha.cta.description: Click below and secure your spot for the most amazing boat tour in Maragogi!

sobre.title: About Us - Meu Caribe
sobre.banner.description: Learn about our story and the passion we have for creating unforgettable experiences in the waters of Maragogi.
sobre.history.p1: Meu Caribe was born from the love for the paradisiacal beaches of Maragogi and the desire to share its beauty with the world.
sobre.history.p2: Since our beginning, we have been dedicated to offering quality services, with safety and hospitality that makes our clients feel like part of our family.
sobre.history.p3: Today we are a reference in boat tours and water adventures in Maragogi, providing unique experiences that stay in each visitor's memory.
sobre.mission.subtitle: To be the leading reference in tours and water adventures in Maragogi, exceeding every client's expectations.
sobre.value_safety.title: Safety
sobre.value_safety.description: Our top priority. Certified equipment and trained crew.
sobre.value_excellence.title: Excellence
sobre.value_excellence.description: In every detail, from customer service to onboard experience.
sobre.value_sustainability.title: Sustainability
sobre.value_sustainability.description: Respect and preservation of Maragogi's marine ecosystem.
sobre.value_passion.title: Passion
sobre.value_passion.description: We love what we do and it shows in every tour.
